title: Machining Strategy Time Optimizer
description: Calculates optimal machining cycle time and identifies hidden losses using Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO 9001 principles.

inputs.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3685 standard for tool life; affects surface finish and cycle time.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3685 standard for tool life; affects surface finish and cycle time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takım ömrü için ISO 3685 standardı; yüzey kalitesini ve çevrim süresini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 3685 Standard für Werkzeugstandzeit; beeinflusst Oberflächengüte und Zykluszeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Norme ISO 3685 pour la durée de vie de l'outil ; affecte l'état de surface et le temps de cycle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Norma ISO 3685 para vida útil de la herramienta; afecta el acabado superficial y el tiempo de ciclo.

inputs.label: Feed Rate (f)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3002/1 standard; influences chip load and tool wear.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3002/1 standard; influences chip load and tool wear.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 3002/1 standardı; talaş yükünü ve takım aşınmasını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 3002/1 Standard; beeinflusst Spanbelastung und Werkzeugverschleiß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Norme ISO 3002/1 ; influence la charge de copeaux et l'usure de l'outil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Norma ISO 3002/1; influye en la carga de viruta y el desgaste de la herramienta.

inputs.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3002/1; affects cutting forces and power consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3002/1; affects cutting forces and power consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 3002/1; kesme kuvvetlerini ve güç tüketimini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: ISO 3002/1 ; affecte les forces de coupe et la consommation d'énergie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Norma ISO 3002/1; afecta las fuerzas de corte y el consumo de energía.

inputs.label: Part Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Workpiece geometry; defines total travel distance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Workpiece geometry; defines total travel distance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş parçası geometrisi; toplam hareket mesafesini tanımlar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Géométrie de la pièce ; définit la distance totale de déplacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Geometría de la pieza de trabajo; define la distancia total de recorrido.

inputs.label: Part Diameter (D)
inputs.businessContext: Workpiece diameter; used for rotational speed calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Workpiece diameter; used for rotational speed calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş parçası çapı; dönme hızı hesaplamasında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Werkstückdurchmesser; wird für die Drehzahlberechnung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la pièce ; utilisé pour le calcul de la vitesse de rotation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la pieza de trabajo; utilizado para el cálculo de la velocidad de rotación.

inputs.label: Tool Change Time (Tct)
inputs.businessContext: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) metric; Lean manufacturing.

businessContext_i18n.en: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) metric; Lean manufacturing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) metriği; Yalın üretim.
businessContext_i18n.de: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) Kennzahl; Lean Manufacturing.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Métrique SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) ; fabrication Lean.
businessContext_i18n.es: Métrica SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die); fabricación Lean.

inputs.label: Tool Life (T)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3685 Taylor tool life equation; affects cost and downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3685 Taylor tool life equation; affects cost and downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 3685 Taylor takım ömrü denklemi; maliyet ve duruş süresini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: ISO 3685 Taylor-Standzeitgleichung; beeinflusst Kosten und Stillstand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équation de durée de vie d'outil ISO 3685 Taylor ; affecte le coût et les temps d'arrêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ecuación de vida de herramienta ISO 3685 de Taylor; afecta el coste y el tiempo de inactividad.

inputs.label: Number of Passes (n_passes)
inputs.businessContext: Roughing/finishing strategy; impacts total cycle time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Roughing/finishing strategy; impacts total cycle time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaba/ince işleme stratejisi; toplam çevrim süresini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Stratégie d'ébauche/finition ; impacte le temps de cycle total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Estrategia de desbaste/acabado; impacta el tiempo total de ciclo.

rules.message: Feed rate too high relative to cutting speed; risk of poor surface finish (ISO 1302).
Depth of cut exceeds 50% of part diameter; risk of chatter and tool breakage.
Tool life less than 10 minutes; excessive downtime and cost (Lean waste).

thresholds.message: Cycle time exceeds 15 minutes; consider high-feed strategy or multi-tooling.
Estimated cost per part exceeds $50; review tooling and parameters.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
